findings.description: `ClientBuilder` is a PascalCase class name appearing in the s6 code example (`ClientBuilder.newClient()`) but is not listed in the section's hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source s6 code: `Client client = ClientBuilder.newClient().register(new LogbookClientFilter(logbook));` — `ClientBuilder` is present but absent from hints array `["LogbookClientFilter", "JAX-RSクライアント登録"]`.
